A '''Bliz''' was a plump [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Bird/Legends|bird]] that was native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]]. It produced pink-shelled [[Wikipedia:egg|eggs]] that were considered to be a [[Hapan]] delicacy. Blizes made their homes in [[blizcot]]s.

{{Creature-stub}}
